{# Custom front matter must be flat scalars: hwaro's TOML reader does not surface inline-table sub-keys, so `prev_page = { path = "..." }` silently yields nothing. Use prev_page_path / prev_page_label instead. The stored paths are language-neutral; lang_prefix puts them under /ko. #} {% if page.extra is defined %} {% if page.extra.prev_page_path is defined or page.extra.next_page_path is defined %}
{% if page.extra.prev_page_path is defined %} {{ "ui.previous" | t }} {{ page.extra.prev_page_label | e }} {% endif %} {% if page.extra.next_page_path is defined %} {{ "ui.next" | t }} {{ page.extra.next_page_label | e }} {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endif %}
